notes: Classification preserves the full fee ledger and does not split blended tier rows into interchange and markup without external evidence.
Full First Data/Clover fee ledger rows are parsed from the printed FEES section and reconciled against section totals, type totals, and the grand total.
Classification uses statement-visible type labels; reference-rate matching is still required before claiming pass-through-at-cost.

Full First Data/Clover statements do not print per-batch funded amounts; this ledger reconciles submitted batch sales plus the month-end fee row to the printed Total Amount Processed.

candidateTotals.label: Total Amount Submitted
candidateTotals.selectionReason: Statement-level summary total and supporting card/batch/interchange volumes agree.

candidateTotals.label: Total Amount Processed
candidateTotals.selectionReason: Statement uses processed amount as post-fee funded/processed result.

candidateTotals.label: Fees
candidateTotals.selectionReason: Statement-level summary fee total reconciles with fee section grand total.

candidateTotals.label: Total Gross Sales You Submitted
candidateTotals.rejectionReason: Gross sales before refunds are not the effective-rate denominator when submitted volume is available.

candidateTotals.label: Summary By Card Type Total Amount You Submitted
candidateTotals.rejectionReason: Supporting evidence only; statement-level summary total has higher priority.

candidateTotals.label: Total Interchange Charges/Program Fees
candidateTotals.rejectionReason: Fee bucket only; not all-in total fees.

candidateTotals.label: Interchange/Program Detail TOTAL
candidateTotals.rejectionReason: Interchange detail total is audit/detail evidence and does not equal all-in total fees or the fee-summary pass-through bucket.

candidateTotals.label: Gross Reportable Sales
candidateTotals.sourceSection: TOTAL GROSS REPORTABLE SALES BY TIN
candidateTotals.rejectionReason: Tax/reporting value is not statement-period fee-analysis volume.

candidateTotals.label: 2024 YTD Gross Reportable Sales
candidateTotals.sourceSection: TOTAL GROSS REPORTABLE SALES BY TIN
candidateTotals.rejectionReason: YTD tax/reporting value is not statement-period fee-analysis volume.

excludedTotals.label: Total Gross Sales You Submitted
excludedTotals.reason: Gross sales before refunds are not the effective-rate denominator when submitted volume is available.

excludedTotals.label: Interchange/Program Detail TOTAL
excludedTotals.reason: Interchange detail total is not all-in fees and does not match the fee-summary pass-through bucket.

excludedTotals.label: Gross Reportable Sales
excludedTotals.sourceSection: TOTAL GROSS REPORTABLE SALES BY TIN
excludedTotals.reason: Reportable sales are tax/reporting values, not fee-analysis volume.

excludedTotals.label: 2024 YTD Gross Reportable Sales
excludedTotals.sourceSection: TOTAL GROSS REPORTABLE SALES BY TIN
excludedTotals.reason: YTD sales are not the current statement-period processing volume.

supportingVolumeAgreement.explanation: Summary, card-type total, batch total, and interchange detail volume agree.

supportingFeeAgreement.explanation: Fee-summary interchange/program bucket differs from interchange detail total; preserve both separately.

decision.reason: Accepted with parser caveat(s): supportingFeeAgreement, filename_period_mismatch, interchange_detail_total_differs_from_fee_summary, reportable_sales_excluded.

warnings.message: Source filename says Jan 2024, but statement content shows 10/01/24 - 10/31/24.
Interchange detail total is $806.59 while fee-summary interchange/program bucket is $955.20.
Reportable/YTD sales are present but excluded from fee-analysis volume.
